user_query: Design the overall project architecture for the Health Data Insight competition, including directory structure, data pipeline, and analysis plan.
ai_response_summary: Proposed a modular Python package (src/hdi/) with separate modules for data, features, models, visualization, and API. Designed a pipeline centered on master_panel.parquet as single source of truth. Identified 3 dimensions with specific methods: Dim1 (spatiotemporal ESDA, panel regression), Dim2 (PAF/Shapley attribution, system dynamics), Dim3 (DEA, LP optimization). Proposed novel GHRI composite index.
outcome: Adopted proposed architecture with all 5 provided datasets integrated
